name: ceph-code-context-manual-cases

generatedFrom.note: Function names and file/line locations were verified against Ceph main at the fixed commit above. Log lines below are synthetic manual-test fixtures designed to exercise function extraction and code rendering.

batchCommand: printf '%s\n' '2026-04-12T10:12:01.123+0800 7f11d2a7f700 -1 monclient: MonClient::handle_auth_bad_method old_auth_method=2 result=-13 allowed_methods=[2] allowed_modes=[1,2] auth failed for mon.a' '2026-04-12T10:12:01.124+0800 7f11d2a7f700  3 monclient: MonClient::handle_monmap accepted monmap epoch=945 previous_epoch=944' '2026-04-12T10:12:02.001+0800 7f11d2a7f700  5 objecter: Objecter::handle_osd_map got epochs [123,126] > 122 pool=rbd resend_ops=3' '2026-04-12T10:12:02.112+0800 7f11d2a7f700 10 objecter: Objecter::ms_dispatch2 type=CEPH_MSG_OSD_OPREPLY tid=9012 from osd.17' '2026-04-12T10:12:02.183+0800 7f11d2a7f700 20 objecter: Objecter::_send_op_account inflight_ops=128 target=osd.17 op=writefull oid=rbd_data.107' '2026-04-12T10:12:03.220+0800 7f11d2a7f700  5 pg: PG::get_with_id pgid=1.23 id=44 ref=7->8' '2026-04-12T10:12:03.221+0800 7f11d2a7f700  5 pg: PG::unlock pgid=1.23 state=active+clean releasing lock'

cases.purpose: Validate class::method extraction for monitor auth failure handling.
